title: Spectral Rewiring for Exploration, Purification, and Model Merging
innovation_summary: Spectral Rewiring for Exploration, Purification, and Model Merging: We show that the reasoning-effective component of these updates is largely concentrated in the base model's spectral space, motivating Subspace-Aligned Rewiring (SAR), a post-hoc editing method.
